history.text: Hotak Emirate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Durrani Empire ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Barakzai Emirate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Unification brought separate territories or communities into a single state framework.
Afghanistan became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.
A kingdom was proclaimed, placing monarchy at the centre of Afghanistan's state authority.
Afghanistan became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
Democratic Republic introduced a new form of state rule.

worthSeeing.title: Band-e-Amir:
worthSeeing.text: Stunning turquoise lakes in a remote canyon, Afghanistan's first national park.

worthSeeing.title: Bamiyan Valley:
worthSeeing.text: Site of the destroyed giant Buddhas, with dramatic cliff dwellings and history.

worthSeeing.title: Wakhan Corridor:
worthSeeing.text: Remote mountain corridor between Tajikistan and Pakistan, ancient Silk Road route.
